$comment: Human-reproducible SCADA/MES/HVAC journeys. lane=human = golden click-through; agent = AI Studio/tool playbook with UI verify; both = either.

scada-pump-station.title: Pump station from plant spec (UI)
scada-pump-station.description: Golden SCADA journey: invent a pump station in the console without naming agent tools. Applying scada-facility-overview must auto-create missing mimicPath (no 404).
scada-pump-station.prompt: I need a small oil & gas pump station: two gate valves, two pumps, one flow meter, a mimic overview, an operator dashboard, and a high-pressure alert that an operator can see in Alarms.
scada-pump-station.uiJourney: Login (admin) → Explorer devices → Dashboard + template scada-facility-overview (auto-creates facility-overview mimic) → Mimic editor → Alert → Operator app → Alarms
humanSteps: Sign in as admin at the web console.
Open Explorer → Devices and create virtual devices for valves, pumps, and a flow meter.
Create a Dashboard; apply layout template scada-facility-overview — the platform must create root.platform.mimics.facility-overview if missing (no 404).
Open Mimic editor for facility-overview and place pump/valve symbols; save.
Create a high-pressure alert rule on a pump variable; confirm it appears under Alarms / Alarm Console.
Create an Operator app pointing at the dashboard; open Operator and verify devices table + mimic + alarms.

scada-mimic-facility.title: Tank-farm facility mimic (UI)
scada-mimic-facility.description: Golden SCADA mimic journey for a facility overview.
scada-mimic-facility.prompt: Create a tank-farm facility mimic with tank levels and valve positions, plus a facility overview dashboard an operator can open in Operator mode.
scada-mimic-facility.uiJourney: Explorer → Mimic editor → Dashboard builder → Operator
humanSteps: In Explorer, create or select tank and valve objects with level/position variables.
Open Mimic; draw tanks and valves; bind fill and position to variables; save.
Open Dashboard; add overview widgets for the same tags; save.
Switch to Operator mode and open the facility overview screen.

scada-tank-farm.title: Three-tank farm with trends (UI)
scada-tank-farm.description: Golden SCADA historian + overview for storage tanks.
scada-tank-farm.prompt: Build a tank farm with three storage tanks, fill-level charts from historian, and an overview dashboard for operators.
scada-tank-farm.uiJourney: Explorer → enable historian on level vars → Dashboard charts → Operator
humanSteps: Create three tank devices with level variables in Explorer.
Enable historian/history on each level variable.
Build an overview dashboard with three chart widgets bound to those histories.
Open Operator mode and confirm live levels and trends.

scada-alarm-shelf.title: Alarm shelf with operator approval (UI)
scada-alarm-shelf.prompt: Configure a high-pressure alert and an operator alarm shelf so an operator can see and acknowledge the alarm without using admin editors.
scada-alarm-shelf.uiJourney: Explorer (alert rule) → Operator Alarms / alarm shelf dashboard
humanSteps: Select a pressure variable in Explorer and add a high-pressure alert rule.
Ensure Operator UI includes an Alarms or alarm-shelf screen.
Trigger or simulate high pressure; open Operator → Alarms and acknowledge.

scada-historian-trends.title: Historian trend on virt-cluster (UI)
scada-historian-trends.prompt: Enable historian on a sineWave lab variable and add a chart widget to the virt-cluster overview dashboard so I can see trends in Operator mode.
scada-historian-trends.uiJourney: Explorer → variable history → Dashboard chart → Operator
humanSteps: In Explorer, open the sineWave (or virt-cluster) variable and enable history.
Open the virt-cluster overview dashboard; add a chart widget bound to that history; save.
Open Operator mode and confirm the trend updates.

scada-solution-generator.title: Plant spec → SCADA solution (UI)
scada-solution-generator.description: Golden generator path via AI Studio or Solutions, verified in Explorer/Operator.
scada-solution-generator.prompt: From this plant spec create a monitoring solution: two pumps, one flow meter, an overview dashboard, and a high-pressure alert. I will verify devices in Explorer and the dashboard in Operator mode.
scada-solution-generator.uiJourney: AI Studio (Solution generator) or Solutions → Explorer verify → Dashboard → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Open AI Studio → Solution / generator (or Solutions catalog) and paste the plant spec.
Accept generated devices and dashboard.
In Explorer confirm two pumps and one flow meter exist.
Open Operator overview; confirm high-pressure alert is configured under Alarms.

scada-virtual-cluster.title: Virtual cluster lab monitoring (UI)
scada-virtual-cluster.description: Golden lab SCADA deploy + operator shell.
scada-virtual-cluster.prompt: Set up virtual cluster monitoring with three lab devices, hub bindings, an alert, and an operator shell I can open without the object tree.
scada-virtual-cluster.uiJourney: Solutions / Deploy → Explorer verify devices → Operator
humanSteps: From Solutions (or Deploy panel) install/deploy the virtual cluster monitoring setup.
In Explorer verify three lab devices and hub bindings.
Confirm alert rule exists; open Operator UI for the cluster overview.

scada-water-treatment.title: Water treatment plant SCADA (UI)
scada-water-treatment.description: Golden vertical SCADA walkthrough for water treatment.
scada-water-treatment.prompt: Build a water treatment SCADA: intake pump, clarifier basin, effluent flow meter, overview dashboard, and a turbidity/high-flow alert for operators.
scada-water-treatment.uiJourney: AI Studio or Explorer create → Dashboard → Alarms → Operator
humanSteps: Create intake pump, clarifier, and effluent flow meter devices (generator or Explorer).
Build overview dashboard with those tags.
Add alert; open Operator and Alarms to confirm.

scada-modbus-device.title: Modbus TCP device + status dashboard (UI)
scada-modbus-device.description: Golden driver path: Drivers → device → dashboard.
scada-modbus-device.prompt: Add a Modbus TCP device with holding registers and a simple status dashboard so an operator can see register values.
scada-modbus-device.uiJourney: Explorer / Drivers → create Modbus device → map registers → Dashboard → Operator
humanSteps: In Explorer create a Modbus TCP device; set host/port and holding register map.
Confirm variables appear under the device.
Create a status dashboard with value widgets; open in Operator mode.

mes-reference-deploy.title: MES reference deploy (UI)
mes-reference-deploy.description: Golden MES install from Solutions/Marketplace into Operator. Paid marketplace SKU may block demostand; free mes-platform-production is an accepted substitute for UI walkthrough.
mes-reference-deploy.prompt: Install the mes-reference application from Solutions/Marketplace, open its operator shell, and confirm BFF-backed order screens load for an operator.
mes-reference-deploy.uiJourney: Admin → System → Solutions → Install mes-reference (or mes-platform-production) → Operator → Work Queue
humanSteps: Sign in as admin; open System → Solutions (Решения) and locate mes-reference (or free mes-platform-production if paid listing is blocked).
Deploy/import the full bundle (not a catalog stub); wait until status is ready and operatorUi is configured.
Open /?mode=operator&app=mes-reference (or mes-platform-production) and confirm order/list screens render.
Open Work Queue app or sidebar and confirm tasks surface for the MES app.

mes-dispatch-workflow.title: MES dispatch appears in Work Queue (UI)
mes-dispatch-workflow.prompt: After mes-reference is installed, create or trigger a dispatch order so a user task appears in the operator Work Queue and can be claimed.
mes-dispatch-workflow.uiJourney: Operator mes-reference → create/list order → Work Queue claim
humanSteps: Open Operator app mes-reference.
Use the orders screen to list or create a dispatch order.
Open Work Queue; claim the pending user task; complete if required.

mes-defect-demo.title: Defect capture + Work Queue (UI)
mes-defect-demo.prompt: Install mes-defect-demo, capture a defect from the operator screen, and confirm a workflow task lands in Work Queue.
mes-defect-demo.uiJourney: Solutions → Deploy mes-defect-demo → Operator → Work Queue
humanSteps: Deploy mes-defect-demo from Solutions.
Open Operator for mes-defect-demo; submit a defect record.
Open Work Queue and confirm the defect workflow task.

mes-oee-dispatch.title: OEE screens + dispatch workflow (UI)
mes-oee-dispatch.description: Golden OEE MES journey with workflow.
mes-oee-dispatch.prompt: Install mes-oee-reference, open OEE operator dashboards, and verify dispatch workflow tasks show in Work Queue.
mes-oee-dispatch.uiJourney: Solutions → Deploy → Operator OEE tabs → Work Queue
humanSteps: Deploy mes-oee-reference from Solutions.
Open Operator app; switch OEE dashboard tabs.
Trigger or open a dispatch workflow; claim task in Work Queue.

mes-platform-production.title: MES production walkthrough (UI)
mes-platform-production.description: Golden production MES: OEE + batch screens.
mes-platform-production.prompt: Install mes-platform-production and walk an operator through OEE dashboard and batch-run screens without using admin editors.
mes-platform-production.uiJourney: Solutions → Deploy → Operator OEE + batch tabs
humanSteps: Deploy mes-platform-production.
Open Operator; open OEE screen; confirm KPIs render.
Open batch-run screen; confirm phase paths/list load.

mes-solution-generator-factory.title: Factory spec → MES solution (UI)
mes-solution-generator-factory.description: Golden MES generator journey verified in Operator.
mes-solution-generator-factory.prompt: From factory spec: two production lines, a loading rack, an OEE dashboard, and a high-downtime alert. Generate the solution and verify in Explorer and Operator.
mes-solution-generator-factory.uiJourney: AI Studio generator → Explorer → Dashboard → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Paste factory spec into AI Studio solution generator.
Accept generated lines, rack, and OEE dashboard.
Verify objects in Explorer; open Operator OEE; confirm downtime alert under Alarms.

mes-workflow-escalation.title: Dispatch escalation to supervisor (UI)
mes-workflow-escalation.description: Golden MES escalation visible in Work Queue.
mes-workflow-escalation.prompt: On mes-reference, leave a dispatch order pending until it escalates to the supervisor queue, then claim it from Work Queue as supervisor.
humanSteps: Create a dispatch order in mes-reference Operator UI.
Leave it pending past escalation (or trigger escalation path).
Sign in as supervisor (or switch role); open Work Queue and claim the escalated task.

hvac-building-app.title: Building HVAC reference deploy (UI)
hvac-building-app.description: Golden HVAC install into Operator shell. Prefer full examples/building-hvac-app bundle (marketplace listing may be a catalog stub without operatorUi).
hvac-building-app.prompt: Install the building-hvac application, open its operator shell, and confirm the zone list screen loads for an operator.
hvac-building-app.uiJourney: Admin → System → Solutions (Решения) → Install building-hvac → Operator (?mode=operator&app=building-hvac)
humanSteps: Sign in as admin; open System → Solutions (Решения / Marketplace).

Install Building HVAC Reference (appId building-hvac). Prefer a full package with operatorUi — if Operator says UI not found, deploy examples/building-hvac-app/bundle.json via AI Studio Bundle or Application Deploy.
Open /?mode=operator&app=building-hvac and confirm zone list / comfort screens render.

hvac-zone-comfort.title: Zone comfort dashboard widgets (UI)
hvac-zone-comfort.prompt: After building-hvac is installed, add or open a zone comfort dashboard with widgets bound to HVAC zone temperatures and open it in Operator mode.
hvac-zone-comfort.uiJourney: Explorer / Dashboard builder → bind zone temps → Operator
humanSteps: Open building-hvac dashboards in admin Dashboard builder.
Add comfort widgets bound to zone temperature variables; save.
Open Operator building-hvac and confirm comfort values.

hvac-ahu-comfort.title: AHU comfort control board (UI)
hvac-ahu-comfort.prompt: Configure the building-hvac AHU comfort dashboard with zone temperature bindings so an operator can monitor AHU and zones together.
hvac-ahu-comfort.uiJourney: Dashboard builder → bind AHU/zone vars → Operator
humanSteps: Open AHU / comfort dashboard for building-hvac.
Bind zone temperature variables to widgets; save.
Verify in Operator mode.

hvac-scheduler-setpoints.title: Scheduler setpoints update comfort UI (UI)
hvac-scheduler-setpoints.prompt: Change HVAC zone scheduler setpoints and confirm the comfort dashboard reflects the new setpoints for an operator.
hvac-scheduler-setpoints.uiJourney: Schedules → set setpoint → Operator comfort dashboard
humanSteps: Open Schedules for building-hvac zones.
Change a comfort setpoint; save.
Open Operator comfort dashboard and confirm setpoint display updates.

hvac-solution-generator-site.title: HVAC site spec → solution (UI)
hvac-solution-generator-site.prompt: From HVAC site spec: chiller plant, three floor zones, comfort dashboard, high-temperature alert. Generate and verify in Explorer, Operator, and Alarms.
hvac-solution-generator-site.uiJourney: AI Studio generator → Explorer → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Paste site spec into AI Studio solution generator.
Accept chiller, floor zones, comfort dashboard, alert.
Verify in Explorer; open Operator comfort; confirm Alarms has high-temp rule.

hvac-chiller-plant.title: Chiller plant overview + comfort alerts (UI)
hvac-chiller-plant.prompt: Create a chiller plant overview with supply/return temperatures and comfort alerts visible to operators.
humanSteps: Ensure chiller supply/return variables exist (building-hvac or created).
Build chiller overview dashboard; add comfort alerts.
Open Operator and Alarms to confirm.

scada-oil-gas-tankfarm.title: Oil & gas tank farm (agent + UI verify)
scada-oil-gas-tankfarm.prompt: Create an oil and gas tank farm with storage tanks, transfer pumps, facility mimic, and historian trends. A human should be able to open Mimic and Operator overview afterward.
humanSteps: Run via AI Studio chat with the plant ask.
Open Mimic and Operator to verify tanks, pumps, and trends.

scada-energy-thermal.title: Thermal power SCADA (agent + UI verify)
scada-energy-thermal.prompt: Build thermal power plant monitoring (boiler, steam turbine, substation overview) using mini-tec where applicable. Verify operator screens open after deploy.
humanSteps: Deploy mini-tec from Solutions if not present.
Open Operator and confirm thermal/overview screens.

scada-pipeline-segment.title: Pipeline segment SCADA (agent + UI verify)
scada-pipeline-segment.prompt: Deploy midstream pipeline SCADA with valve station, pressure sensors, linepack mimic, and pressure alert. Verify Mimic and Alarms in the console.
humanSteps: Generate or create pipeline segment objects.
Open Mimic and Alarms; confirm operator overview.

scada-opcua-line.title: OPC UA line mimic (agent + UI verify)
scada-opcua-line.prompt: Provision an OPC UA production line with throughput mimic and historian trends; verify Mimic and Dashboard in UI.
humanSteps: Create OPC UA line devices.
Open Mimic and Dashboard trends in Operator.

scada-iec104-substation.title: IEC-104 substation (agent + UI verify)
scada-iec104-substation.prompt: Create IEC-104 substation overview with breaker status and trip alerts; verify Alarms and Operator dashboard.
humanSteps: Create substation virtual/IEC devices.
Confirm breaker widgets and trip alerts in Operator/Alarms.

scada-mimic-pump-overview.title: Pump station mimic + historian (UI)
scada-mimic-pump-overview.prompt: Build a pump station with MIMIC diagram, historian trends, and a facility overview dashboard for operators.
humanSteps: Create pump station objects.
Save Mimic; enable historian; build facility dashboard; open Operator.

scada-simulator-profiles.title: Simulator profiles deploy (UI verify)
scada-simulator-profiles.prompt: Import simulator-profiles and verify virtual devices appear under the platform tree in Explorer.
humanSteps: Deploy simulator-profiles from Solutions.
In Explorer expand virtual devices and confirm profiles loaded.

scada-spreadsheet-demo.title: Spreadsheet widget demo (UI)
scada-spreadsheet-demo.prompt: Install the spreadsheet demo bundle and open the dashboard so an operator can see spreadsheet widget bindings.
humanSteps: Deploy spreadsheet-demo (app sheet-demo).
Open the dashboard with spreadsheet widget in Operator or admin preview.

scada-snmp-dashboard.title: SNMP host dashboard (UI verify)
scada-snmp-dashboard.prompt: Configure SNMP localhost monitoring with CPU, memory, and network widgets on a dashboard an operator can open.
humanSteps: Configure SNMP driver for localhost.
Build dashboard widgets; open Operator.

platform-primitive-deploy.title: Platform primitive deploy (UI verify)
platform-primitive-deploy.prompt: Deploy the platform-primitive example bundle and open its operator overview. Confirm hub device and overview dashboard exist in Explorer.
platform-primitive-deploy.uiJourney: AI Studio Bundle / Solutions → Deploy → Explorer → Operator
humanSteps: Deploy platform-primitive from Solutions or AI Studio Bundle tab.
In Explorer confirm platform-primitive-hub and platform-primitive-overview.
Open Operator overview for the app.

platform-generator-primitives.title: Generator primitives (UI)
platform-generator-primitives.prompt: Describe a small monitoring plant with two devices and an overview dashboard plus one alert; generate it and verify devices in Explorer and the dashboard in Operator.
platform-generator-primitives.uiJourney: AI Studio generator → Explorer → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Paste the plant description into AI Studio solution generator.
Verify two devices in Explorer and overview in Operator; check Alarms.

mes-batch-run-tracking.title: Batch run phase tracking (UI verify)
mes-batch-run-tracking.prompt: Install mes-platform-production and open batch-run screens so an operator can track phase paths.
humanSteps: Deploy mes-platform-production.
Open Operator batch-run screen and confirm phases list.

mes-demo-app-deploy.title: Demo app deploy (UI verify)
mes-demo-app-deploy.prompt: Install the demo application bundle and open its operator screens; run a sample report if available.
humanSteps: Deploy demo from Solutions.
Open /?mode=operator&app=demo and confirm screens.

mes-lab-training.title: Lab training bundle (UI verify)
mes-lab-training.prompt: Install lab-training and verify virtual meter variables in Explorer.
humanSteps: Deploy lab-training.
In Explorer open virtual meter variables.

mes-marketplace-demo.title: Marketplace demo install (UI)
mes-marketplace-demo.prompt: Install marketplace-demo from Marketplace/Solutions and open its operator UI.
humanSteps: Open Marketplace; install marketplace-demo.
Open Operator for marketplace-demo.

mes-mini-tec-deploy.title: Mini-TEC deploy (UI)
mes-mini-tec-deploy.prompt: Install mini-tec with validate → dry-run → import, then open configured operator dashboards.
mes-mini-tec-deploy.uiJourney: Solutions / AI Studio Bundle → Deploy steps → Operator
humanSteps: Deploy mini-tec from Solutions or Bundle tab.
Open Operator dashboards for mini-tec.

mes-oee-reference.title: MES OEE reference deploy (UI verify)
mes-oee-reference.prompt: Install mes-oee-reference and open OEE operator screens.
humanSteps: Deploy mes-oee-reference.
Open Operator OEE screens.

mes-ogp-events-deploy.title: OGP events deploy (UI verify)
mes-ogp-events-deploy.prompt: Install mes-ogp-events for shop-floor event registration and open the operator event screens.
humanSteps: Deploy mes-ogp-events.
Open Operator and confirm event registration screens.

mes-platform-cert.title: MES platform certification (UI verify)
mes-platform-cert.prompt: Install mes-platform and open OEE dashboard paths in Operator.
humanSteps: Deploy mes-platform.
Open Operator OEE paths.

mes-quality-inspection.title: Quality inspection screens (UI)
mes-quality-inspection.prompt: With mes-defect-demo installed, open quality inspection / defect capture screens and confirm the quality dashboard for an operator.
humanSteps: Open Operator mes-defect-demo.
Capture or list defects; open quality dashboard tab.

mes-spc-dashboard.title: SPC quality dashboard (UI)
mes-spc-dashboard.prompt: On mes-platform-production, open the SPC quality dashboard with chart and sample list for an operator.
humanSteps: Deploy mes-platform-production if needed.
Open Operator SPC/quality dashboard; confirm chart and sample list.

mes-warehouse-app.title: Warehouse app (UI verify)
mes-warehouse-app.prompt: Install warehouse-app and open SQL-backed operator screens.
humanSteps: Deploy warehouse.
Open Operator warehouse screens.

hvac-alerts-comfort.title: Zone comfort high-temp alert (UI)
hvac-alerts-comfort.prompt: Configure HVAC zone comfort dashboard with a high-temperature alert and verify it in Operator Alarms.
humanSteps: Open zone comfort dashboard; ensure high-temp alert rule exists.
Open Operator and Alarms; confirm alert.

hvac-e2e-deploy.title: HVAC e2e deploy playbook (UI verify)
hvac-e2e-deploy.prompt: Deploy building-hvac end-to-end (validate, dry-run, import, operator UI) and open the operator shell.
hvac-e2e-deploy.uiJourney: AI Studio Bundle → Deploy steps → Operator
humanSteps: Run deploy steps for building-hvac.
Open Operator building-hvac.

hvac-energy-dashboard.title: HVAC energy dashboard (UI)
hvac-energy-dashboard.prompt: Build an HVAC energy dashboard with zone historian trends and a setpoint-drift alert; open it in Operator mode.
humanSteps: Enable history on zone energy/temp tags.
Build energy dashboard; add drift alert; open Operator.

hvac-lab-mqtt.title: Lab MQTT temperature demo (UI)
hvac-lab-mqtt.prompt: Install lab-mqtt-temperature for a single-zone temperature demo and open its operator/dashboard view.
humanSteps: Deploy mqtt-temperature-lab.
Open Operator or dashboard and confirm temperature value.

hvac-mqtt-alerts.title: MQTT temperature alerts (UI)
hvac-mqtt-alerts.prompt: Install lab-mqtt-temperature and add a high zone-temperature alert; verify in Operator Alarms.
humanSteps: Deploy mqtt-temperature-lab.
Add high-temp alert; open Operator Alarms.

hvac-multi-floor-zones.title: Multi-floor HVAC zones (UI verify)
hvac-multi-floor-zones.prompt: Install building-hvac with floor zone hub and multi-zone comfort; verify floors in Operator.
humanSteps: Deploy building-hvac.
Open Operator and confirm multi-floor zone comfort screens.

hvac-smart-building-bms.title: Smart building BMS (agent + UI verify)
hvac-smart-building-bms.prompt: Build a smart building BMS with lighting panel, access controller, and zone comfort dashboard; verify Operator shell.
humanSteps: Generate BMS via AI Studio.
Open Operator comfort/lighting overview.

hvac-zone-binding.title: Zone comfort CEL binding (UI verify)
hvac-zone-binding.prompt: Add a CEL binding for zone comfort index and show it on the comfort dashboard for operators.
humanSteps: Create comfort-index binding rule.
Bind widget on comfort dashboard; open Operator.
